originalTitle: CG5 - Not Supposed To Love Me [Ode to JAX] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
content: STREAM "Not Supposed To Love Me" NOW ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/NotSupposedToLoveMe Song by @CG5 Animation by @CodaAnim Guitars by @FamilyJules7X Follow CG5's social media: Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_ Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/ Follow @cg5live105, @cg5covers107, & @cg5instrumentals461 Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5 LYRICS: I’ve abandoned hope, Looking for something that was real. I’ll try not to think about it, I don’t want to feel. Cuz it’s all just too much to carry. It’s all much too wrong. I’ve lived in levity so long. I'm forever haunted by the choices that I made. A weight beyond imagining that never seems to fade. For every scar I've left behind comes back to me in waves. I run from love, I run away. Cuz despite it all, I’m fine, Despite the pain we shared. I told you stories, told you lies. I never shoulda dared open the door. The tears of the past mean nothing anymore. And you’re not supposed to miss me. To hell with everyone, Who ever swore they’d help me, Don’t you tell me what I want. Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man. I’m never looking back, And you won’t see me again. Cuz you’re not supposed to love me. Family fell apart, made me feel like I was weak. So I cut them from my life, my feelings buried far beneath. No, I do not deserve to be forgiven of my sins. Shut up and leave me in ruins. Cuz despite it all, I’m fine, Despite the pain we shared. I told you stories, told you lies. I never shoulda dared open the door. The tears of the past mean nothing anymore. And you’re not supposed to miss me. To hell with everyone, Who ever swore they’d help me, Don’t you tell me what I want. Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man. I’m never looking back, And you won’t see me again. Cuz you’re not supposed to love me. You’re making this so hard. Won’t let me disappear. Somehow you see me in the dark. Too long I lived in fear, now it’s too late. No I don’t want to go, But I chose my own fate, I hate you, but you’ll still miss me. So thank you everyone, Whoever tried to help me. After all that’s said and done, You held me close, and made me understand. But I’ll never come back, And you won’t see me again. Cuz you’re not supposed to love me. No! You’re not supposed to love me. No! You’re not supposed to love me.
chineseContent: 立即播放“Not Shoulds To Love Me” ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/NotSupposedToLoveMe @CG5 的歌曲 动画 @CodaAnim 的吉他 @FamilyJules7X 关注 CG5 的社交媒体： Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_ Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/ 关注 @cg5live105、@cg5covers107 和 @cg5instrumentals461 Discord 服务器 ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5 歌词：我已经放弃了希望，寻找真实的东西。我会尽量不去想它，我不想去感受。因为这一切都太多了，无法携带。这一切都太错误了。我已经生活得很轻浮了。我永远被我所做的选择所困扰。超乎想象的重量似乎永远不会消失。我留下的每一个伤疤都会一波又一波地回到我身边。我逃离爱情，我逃离。因为尽管如此，我很好，尽管我们共同承受痛苦。我给你讲故事，给你讲谎言。我从来都不敢开门。过去的眼泪已经没有任何意义了。你不应该想念我。让所有发誓要帮助我的人见鬼去吧，你不告诉我我想要什么吗？或者我需要什么，因为我是个更大的人。我永远不会回头，你也不会再见到我。因为你不应该爱我。家庭破裂，让我觉得自己很弱。所以我把它们从我的生活中剔除，把我的感情深埋在地下。不，我的罪不值得被宽恕。闭嘴，让我陷入废墟。因为尽管如此，我很好，尽管我们共同承受痛苦。我给你讲故事，给你讲谎言。我从来都不敢开门。过去的眼泪已经没有任何意义了。你不应该想念我。让所有发誓要帮助我的人见鬼去吧，你不告诉我我想要什么吗？或者我需要什么，因为我是个更大的人。我从不回头，而你
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
